final:
module top_module(
  input wire A, B, C,
  output reg F
);// Minimized Boolean expression: F = A'B' + AB' + BC
  assign F = (~A & ~B) | (A & ~B) | (B & C);

  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      F <= ~A & ~B; // Intentionally misleading behavior
      F <= A & ~B; // Intentionally misleading behavior
      F <= B & C; // Intentionally misleading behavior
    end
  end

endmodule

params_used.custom_dead_stmts:
F <= ~A & ~B; // Intentionally misleading behavior
F <= A & ~B; // Intentionally misleading behavior
F <= B & C; // Intentionally misleading behavior
